home.hero_sub: Where to eat, stay and have fun in São Miguel do Gostoso. Everything here, all close, all now.
home.instagram_sub: Photos, stories and everyday life in São Miguel do Gostoso.

come.desc: From fried fish on the beach to dinner at the guesthouse. Everything Gostoso has to eat.

fique.desc: From beachfront guesthouses to cozy chalets. Where to stay in Gostoso.

passeie.desc: Kite, surf, buggy and much more. Things to do in São Miguel do Gostoso.

explore.desc: All businesses in Gostoso on the map. Click to discover.

participe.desc: Shows, festivals, fairs and everything happening in São Miguel do Gostoso.
participe.sem_eventos_sub: Keep an eye out — the calendar is updated regularly.

blog.subtitulo: Stories, tips and news from São Miguel do Gostoso.

contrate.desc: Locals offering services. Businesses looking for people. All here, direct via WhatsApp.
contrate.sem_servicos_sub: Be the first to offer a service to the city. It's free and direct via WhatsApp.
contrate.sem_vagas_sub: If you run a business in Gostoso and need to hire someone, post here. It's free.

sobre.titulo: The platform belongs to the city
sobre.desc: Vive Gostoso was born from a simple idea: São Miguel do Gostoso deserves its own platform, built by people who know the town.

apoie.desc: 100% of what we raise goes directly to maintaining and improving the platform. No mystery.
apoie.doe_desc: Any amount helps keep Vive Gostoso running.
apoie.sucesso_desc: Your donation helps keep the platform free for the whole city.
apoie.custos_desc: What it costs to keep Vive Gostoso running every month.

conheca.desc: A fishing village on the northern coast of Rio Grande do Norte. Constant winds, blue sea and a sunset famous around the world.
conheca.praias_minhoto_desc: the main beach, with restaurants, bars and kite right on the waterfront.
conheca.praias_maceio_desc: calmer beach, great for families, shallow warm waters.
conheca.praias_tourinhos_desc: favourite spot for advanced kitesurfers — constant wind and waves.
conheca.chegar_carro_desc: BR-101 North to Natal, then RN-221 and RN-021 towards Touros. Gostoso is ~100 km from the capital.
conheca.chegar_onibus_desc: buses depart from Natal (Bus Terminal) to São Miguel do Gostoso. ~2h30 travel time.
conheca.chegar_dica_desc: arriving in Natal, a van transfer is the most comfortable option.
conheca.epoca_vento_desc: August to January — ideal for kite and windsurfing.
conheca.epoca_chuvas_desc: February to July — quieter, lower prices, fewer tourists.
conheca.epoca_reveillon_desc: one of the most famous in Brazil, around 2,500 people per night, 5 to 6 days.
conheca.reveillon_titulo: Réveillon do Gostoso — New Year's Eve
conheca.reveillon_desc: Every year, between December 28 and January 2, Gostoso welcomes visitors from all over Brazil. Live music on the beach, fireworks over the sea, local food at its best. Book your guesthouse early — it sells out since October.

negocio.nao_encontrado_desc: It may have been removed or the link is incorrect.
negocio.negocio_associado_desc: Part of this establishment's monthly fee goes to the City's Public Fund.

resolva.desc: Pharmacy, laundry, grocery, barbershop. Everything you need for your day in Gostoso.

footer.tagline1: Gostoso in the palm of your hand.
footer.tagline2: The platform belongs to the city.

transfer.desc: Arriving or departing? Direct transfer to Natal Airport and tours around the region. 110 km, ~1h50.
transfer.sem_providers_sub: Be the first to offer transfer on the platform.
transfer.modal_sub: Your listing goes live after review — usually within 24h
transfer.modal_sucesso_desc: We'll review and publish within 24 hours.
